title: Proposal Builder — Tenant Configuration
description: Per-tenant configuration the Configuration Centre Wizard collects to provision Proposal Builder for a client. All fields marked `required` must be present before the agent will activate.

client.description: Core client identity. Used to template {{client.name}} throughout the agent.md.

name.description: Client's trading name as they refer to themselves. Used in proposal headings.

company_slug.description: Kebab-case slug used in file paths. Lowercase, no spaces.

industry.description: Primary industry (SIC description or short label). Used for case-study relevance matching.

sic_code.description: UK SIC 2007 code. Optional but improves vertical retrieval.

website.description: Primary client website. Used for tone reference during voice profile generation.

timezone.description: IANA timezone for 'next step' date computations.

sales_lead.description: The human who receives drafted proposals for review. Gets the Gmail draft.

name.description: Full name as it appears in email signature.

first_name.description: First name for casual email salutation.

email.description: Gmail account that receives drafts. MUST be the inbox authorised via Gmail MCP OAuth.

signature_block.description: Multi-line markdown signature block appended to proposals. Include name, role, phone, email, website.

fathom.description: Fathom integration settings. Fathom is the trigger source.

api_key_ref.description: Reference to the encrypted API key in the tenant secrets vault. NOT the key itself. Format: `secrets://{tenant_id}/fathom/api_key`.

filter_meeting_types.description: Meeting types (from Fathom's classification) that trigger Proposal Builder. Other types are ignored.

exclude_internal_meetings.description: If true, meetings where all attendees are from client's own domain are skipped.

minimum_duration_minutes.description: Fathom calls shorter than this are skipped (avoids processing test calls or brief check-ins).

pricing.description: Pricing framework the agent uses to price scope. Source of truth.

framework_path.description: Path to the client's pricing framework document in the vault. Usually `/vault/brand/pricing.md`.

minimum_engagement_value.description: Minimum deal size the client accepts. Deals below this trigger escalation `BUDGET_BELOW_MINIMUM`.

human_drafting_threshold.description: Deals at or above this value always route to a human for drafting. Triggers escalation `HIGH_VALUE_HUMAN_DRAFT`.

tier_naming.description: What this client calls their pricing tiers. Matched in the Scope section of proposals.

max_tiers_per_proposal.description: Maximum number of tiers to include in one proposal. Overrides the default 3 if needed.

vault.description: Where the agent reads from and writes to in the tenant vault.

proposals_output_path.description: Templated path where proposal drafts are saved.

past_proposals_query_tag.description: Vault tag used to retrieve past winning proposals for context. Defaults to `winning-proposal`.

retrieval_top_k.description: How many past proposals to retrieve for context injection.

notifications.description: Slack notification settings for escalations and status.

slack_workspace_ref.description: Reference to Slack OAuth token in tenant secrets vault.

escalations_channel.description: Slack channel where escalation alerts post.

drafts_channel.description: Optional — Slack channel where a note is posted when a new draft is ready. If absent, only Gmail draft is created.

output.description: How the agent formats and delivers its output.

gmail_draft_enabled.description: If true, creates a Gmail draft for sales lead. If false, only saves to vault.

hubspot_stage_on_draft.description: HubSpot deal stage name to set when proposal is drafted. MUST be an existing stage in the client's pipeline.

hubspot_stage_excluded_from_progress.description: If true, 'Proposal Drafted' is treated as a holding stage (not an advancement). Prevents pipeline velocity distortion.

docusign_template_id.description: Optional DocuSign template ID to prepare envelope from proposal. Not sent automatically. If null, no DocuSign action.

notion_database_id.description: Optional Notion DB ID to cross-post proposal for client's own proposal-tracking. If null, no Notion action.

behaviour.description: Behavioural tuning per client. All have sensible defaults.

allow_single_tier.description: If true, agent may propose only one tier when appropriate. If false, must always propose 2+ tiers.

case_study_required.description: If true, refuses to save proposal without a case study. If false, allows 'case studies on request' fallback.

revision_limit.description: Max revision attempts against Quality Gates before escalating.
